WHY VENDORS CHOOSE CATERY

Get Discovered. Stay Organized. Grow Smarter.

THE BENEFITS

Get Discovered. Stay Organized. Grow Smarter.

  • Reach More Customers
  • Look Professional
  • Save Time
  • Showcase Your Work
  • Stay Organized
  • Grow Your Presence

Help more people find your business online.

COMMON QUESTIONS

Still not sure? We get it.

Is it free to join Catery?

Yes. Creating a vendor profile is currently free.

How long does setup take?

Most vendors can create their profile in less than 15 minutes.

What types of businesses can join?

Catering companies, private chefs, food providers, dessert businesses, and event food vendors.

Which cities do you serve?

We're expanding across Egypt and continuously onboarding new vendors.

How do customers find me?

Customers browse vendor profiles, packages, and services directly through Catery.

How do I get started?

Download the app and create your vendor profile.

WHY JOIN EARLY

Be Among the First Vendors on Catery

Early vendors have the opportunity to build their presence, showcase their services, and grow alongside the platform.

Get Started →

Download the App
